---
title: "user_activity"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

source(here::here("scripts", "load_functions.R"))
triggerR <- load_trigger_functions()
```

```{r}
accounts <- if (!exists("accounts")) {
  triggerR$active_accounts()
} else accounts

trigger_daily <- if (!exists("trigger_daily")) {
  triggerR$read_trigger_tables(granularity = "daily", cores = 5)
} else trigger_daily
```

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=5}
p_active_users <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(n_users = n_distinct(userId), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(date, n_users)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of active users", title = "Daily active users")

p_active_users
```

```{r}
p_records_per_user <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"), date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n_records_total), users = n_distinct(userId), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(n_per_user = n / users) %>%
  ggplot(aes(date, n_per_user)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Average records per active user", title = "Daily records per active user")

p_records_per_user
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_daily_active_users.png"), 
       plot = p_active_users, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_daily_records_per_active_user.png"), 
       plot = p_records_per_user, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```
